text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I happen to catch sight of a meet and
greet for Silence Suzuka and her fans. I decide to
take a peek.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Next up, we have the highly-anticipated Q&A
with Suzuka! Let's start with the fine gentleman
over there who had his hand up first!

text_block_list.name: Low-Energy Fan
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, what do you do on your days off?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well... On those days, I like to go running.

text_block_list.name: Nervous Fan
text_block_list.text:
Um, what do you like to do when you need a
change of pace?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I would go out for a run... I guess.

text_block_list.name: Hesitant Fan
text_block_list.text: Um... So, what about things you like?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I like... running...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, but...

text_block_list.name: Hesitant Fan
text_block_list.text: Y-yes?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Strawberry mochi... they're my favorite.

text_block_list.name: Hesitant Fan
text_block_list.text: I-is that so?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every single question that follows is met with the
exact same answer—running. The enthusiasm in
the air starts to dwindle, until...

text_block_list.name: Intellectual Fan
text_block_list.text: W-well then, why do you run?

text_block_list.name: Intellectual Fan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Every time I see you crossing the finish line,
you always seem... so satisfied. I want to know
what it is that elicits such an expression.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hmm. I think that's because... I just love running.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...There was a time when I thought that winning
was everything. And so, I ran solely for that sake.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But after I met a lot of people and got to run
together with them... I remembered the pure,
untainted feelings I started out with.

text_block_list.name: Serious Fan
text_block_list.text:
In that case, what's the most enjoyable moment
when you run?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's... when I get to see the scenery that I long for.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've always loved that feeling... Running free as
can be, alone... with only the sound of my
rhythmic footsteps resonating through the
silence.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That scenery is so... breathtakingly beautiful.
Even now, I run in search of that same feeling.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...But that's not all—I also have other things to
look forward to.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Now I can show all the people around me a way of
running they've never seen before... scenery
they've never seen before.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've begun to appreciate... how incredible that
really is.

text_block_list.name: Passionate Fan
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the blink of an eye, the venue comes alive. The
crowd starts to rattle off question after question
about her sentiments towards running.

text_block_list.name: Excited Fan
text_block_list.text: Are your fans included in those people?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course. For now and forever, I'll keep
running, always chasing that scenery.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I do this for myself and for those who support
me... I want to show everyone scenery they've
never seen before.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So... I ask for your continued support... of my
running...
